[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized illustration shows an orange-haired person in side profile, wearing a white face covering and a turquoise scarf, with a striped background that looks like interior panels.

The main subject is a person depicted in cartoon/anime style, shown from the right side in close-up, with short, spiky orange hair and a sharp side profile. The person wears a white, mask-like face covering with a teal fleur-de-lis emblem on the cheek area and teal edging around the mask contours. A turquoise scarf or high-collar garment wraps around the neck and lower face area, and gray, textured markings appear on the scarf near the throat. The person’s exposed eye area looks toward the right side of the image, and the hair forms a prominent, spiky silhouette.

The setting appears to be an indoor environment or interior-like space, suggested by a background of angular, rectangular panels and stripe-like detailing. Behind the person, a gray-and-white structure with vertical black rectangles and circular/rounded UI-like symbols is visible, with diagonal lines suggesting depth. Lighting is even and bright, typical of a graphic illustration, with clean outlines and flat shading.

No important visible text detected.

In plain language, the image is a close-up animated-style portrait of an orange-haired person wearing a white face covering with a teal emblem and a turquoise neck covering. The background shows angular interior-like paneling with simple graphic symbols and stripe patterns.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
